news.title: Donald Trump annonce vouloir relever "la semaine prochaine" les droits de douane sur les véhicules européens

elements.scenePurpose: Establish the work as a painted field before any symbolic reading begins.
elements.expectedRead: warm mineral canvas with dry pigment variation

elements.scenePurpose: Make the announced increase visible as an ascending pressure mass.
elements.expectedRead: jagged red field climbing into the center-left seam

elements.scenePurpose: Provide the narrow release valve and keep the conflict readable without literal signs.
Counter the upward pressure with a heavy dark field from above.
elements.expectedRead: dark torn mass bearing down from the upper right

representation.label: Upward Tariff Fracture
representation.description: A Still-like painted surface where a red-orange mass climbs through a cooler seam, making escalation visible as pressure rather than illustration.
representation.scenePrompt: Full-frame matte abstract expressionist canvas with jagged red-orange fields pressing upward through a narrow blue-cyan fracture, dark umber counterweight, rough torn pigment edges, restrained motion, no literal political imagery.
representation.colorMood: burnt orange and deep red under tension, cut by a cool blue-cyan interval and anchored with umber black.
representation.spatialIntent: Flat frontal painting logic with shallow parallax only to separate ground, torn masses, seam, and foreground scrape marks.

imageAuthorship.structuralLaw: One upward rupture divides a warm field, with all masses either pressing into it or yielding from it.
imageAuthorship.edgeBehavior: Edges are torn, irregular, mineral, and slightly feathered, never clean geometric outlines.
imageAuthorship.surfaceBehavior: Matte oil-like fields show granular density, dry scrape, and uneven underpainting.
imageAuthorship.depthLogic: Depth is shallow and painterly: background pigment, midground torn plates, foreground scratches.
imageAuthorship.motionLogic: Motion is nearly still, with slow breathing in grain and a faint upward crawl along the rupture.
forbiddenDrift: Do not turn the seam into a glowing portal.
Do not add literal cars, maps, or political symbols.
Do not center everything into a symmetrical target.

technicalTranslation.realizationStrategy: Use a full-frame shader field for the painted ground, custom jagged frontal meshes for the bounded masses, and a restrained fault-line element for the rising seam.
technicalTranslation.whyThisApproach: Existing field and fault modules can handle broad surface and seam behavior, while the torn masses need a specific Still-like geometry module.
notes: Use bloom only as pigment lift, not as luminous effect.
Layer z offsets under 0.08 to avoid staged 3D.

mustShow: visible pigment grain and scraped edges
reviewFocus: Does the blue-cyan seam remain legible?
Do the forms read as painted torn fields rather than UI panels?
Is the escalation structural and non-literal?

surfaceQualities: painted surface behavior matters more than object literalism

rationale.newsTranslation: The proposed tariff rise becomes vertical pressure and compression.
rationale.artistTranslation: Still's torn color field scale carries the image, with restrained palette contrast and rough painted surface.

techniques.name: Torn Color Field Layering
techniques.purpose: Carry the main image through large irregular color fields.

techniques.name: Dry Pigment Grain
techniques.purpose: Give the fields material density and dry scraped variation.

artisticIntent.statement: A frontal, painted field where the threatened tariff increase becomes a jagged compression of red-orange mass against a cooler European blue-cyan seam, held in Clyfford Still's torn vertical scale rather than literal politics.
artisticIntent.motif: A measured upward pressure fracture cutting through layered color fields.
artisticIntent.emotionalArc: The image begins as broad mineral stillness, tightens into a serrated red-orange escalation, and releases only through a narrow blue-cyan breathing channel.
artisticIntent.compositionLogic: A full-frame matte ground carries bounded torn fields: one heavy orange-red plate rises from the lower left, a darker anchor shard presses from the upper right, and a thin blue-cyan interval keeps the conflict legible without becoming a symbol or portal.
artisticIntent.imagePrompt: A Clyfford Still-inspired abstract expressionist painted surface, full-frame matte canvas, jagged torn vertical fields of orange, red, blackened umber, and blue-cyan, a restrained upward pressure fracture suggesting a coming tariff escalation, no text, no vehicles, no portraits, no flags, rough pigment edges, layered s

techniques.name: Torn Color Field Layering
techniques.purpose: Build large bounded jagged painted masses instead of objects or icons.

techniques.name: Dry Pigment Grain
techniques.purpose: Make every field feel physically painted with uneven oil-like density.

techniques.name: Upward Pressure Seam
techniques.purpose: Express the announced increase as structural compression through a narrow rising rupture.

glsl.vertex: varying vec2 vUv; void main(){ vUv=uv; gl_Position=projectionMatrix*modelViewMatrix*vec4(position,1.0); }
glsl.fragment: precision highp float; varying vec2 vUv; uniform float u_time; uniform vec3 u_colorA; uniform vec3 u_colorB; uniform float u_grainScale; uniform float u_scrape; uniform float u_motion; float hash(vec2 p){ return fract(sin(dot(p,vec2(127.1,311.7)))*43758.5453123); } float noise(vec2 p){ vec2 i=floor(p); vec2 f=fract(p); vec2 u=f*f*(3.0-2.0*f); return mix(mix(hash(i),hash(i+vec2(1.0,0.0)),u.x),mix(hash(i+vec2(0.0,1.0)),hash(i+vec2(1.0,1.0)),u.x),u.y); } void main(){ vec2 uv=vUv; float t=u_time*u_motion; float broad=noise(vec2(uv.x*3.1,uv.y*1.45)+vec2(t,-t*0.37)); float grain=noise(uv*u_grainScale)+0.45*noise(uv*u_grainScale*2.07); float torn=smoothstep(0.34,0.68,broad+0.16*sin(uv.y*10.5+broad*2.2)); vec3 col=mix(u_colorA,u_colorB,torn*0.48); float dry=smoothstep(0.56,0.96,grain)*u_scrape; float fiber=0.5+0.5*sin((uv.y+broad*0.08)*145.0); col-=dry*(0.55+0.45*fiber); col+=0.028*(hash(uv*1200.0)-0.5); col=clamp(col,0.0,1.0); gl_FragColor=vec4(col,1.0); }

intent.statement: Donald Trump annonce vouloir relever "la semaine prochaine" les droits de douane sur les véhicules européens translated through Clyfford Still's visual language as a non-literal image.

visualGravity.dominantStructure: Build the image around one readable structural law.
visualGravity.scaleBehavior: Keep the space bounded and compositionally intentional.

materialLogic.handling: Clyfford Still's surface should feel made, not generic.

tensionEngine.escalationMode: Let tension accumulate through structure, not narration.
tensionEngine.releaseValve: Allow only a narrow zone of release.
